base_prompt_cropped: Professional product photography with tight crop on the item from the provided image. Clean backdrop showing product in realistic use, sharp focus, high-end aesthetic. Keep any visible logos EXACTLY the same.
base_prompt_normal: Professional lifestyle photograph showing the item from the provided image in a realistic styled setting. Sharp focus, high-end aesthetic. Keep any visible logos EXACTLY the same.
